title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at AgroStar Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at AgroStar Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the AgroStar Global Group family as a Frontend Developer in Amritsar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
